race.comment: Tough way to end the day. MAL COUPE (12) spaced his rivals by a big margin first-up in weaker grade over the 1000m in Midway class. Should have little trouble running the 1200m and will get conditions to suit. Sure to be thereabouts. ROSELYN'S STAR (6) proven at this level and gets his chance with Grima's 3kg claim. No match for Sixties with the 58kg when a game second over 1200m at Rosehill in this grade. Fitted with a 795m trial placing and doesn't have to improve much to win this. GATSBY'S (8) finished in the money last start when running second at this track and should strip fitter for past attempts. Stays in the calculations. CHARCOALS (5) returns from a lay-off. Placed in a recent trial at Randwick. Opened last campaign with a fifth at Cranbourne over 1000m. In the mix.
